expected.notes: Many low-age senders rapidly transfer to one boss account.
Direct slang and disproportionate item pricing.

scenarios.title: Layering chain converging to exit wallet

expected.notes: Multi-hop transfers converge into one exit account.
High transaction count and total amount with low-age senders.
Repeated 100x+ price anomalies with coded chat hints.
Two clusters converge to bridge account before cashout.
Repeated staged transfers shortly before expected withdrawal.
Dormant target suddenly receives high-value bursts from fresh accounts.
Legitimate guild dues may look like fan-in smurfing.
Healthy market spikes should avoid hard bans.
Donation spikes should be reviewable without immediate ban.

scenarios.title: Whale purchases with high market average

expected.notes: High absolute value but fair market ratio and low frequency.
Burst payout from official system account.
